overall.description: First-person exploration of an ornate gothic common room (Ravenclaw Common Room from Hogwarts Legacy) featuring a domed blue ceiling, circular constellation rug, and central spiral staircase. The camera enters through an archway, traverses the main chamber, and ascends the wrought-iron staircase.

events.description: passing through the stone archway from the corridor into the main circular chamber

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into the grand circular common room

entered.detail: ornate gothic stone archway framing the entrance from the corridor
colorful poster on wooden board advertising the game of Gobstones
intricate blue and white vaulted domed ceiling with central skylight
large circular rug with blue base and yellow constellation patterns
wooden gazebo-like structure with hanging chandelier in the room's center

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a stone archway entrance into a grand circular common room. A Gobstones poster is visible on the right wall as the ornate blue domed ceiling and central gazebo structure come into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular common room with seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden floor and blue rug toward the center of the room, passing wooden furniture

entered.detail: upholstered cream-colored sofa with dark wooden frame
black wrought-iron spiral staircase with wooden steps
dark wooden grand piano positioned near the arched windows

segments.scene_description: Crossing the large circular blue rug toward the center of the room, passing the wooden gazebo structure. The spiral staircase becomes visible in the distance to the left, and a cream sofa sits to the right near the windows.

events.description: turning left toward the spiral staircase on the left side of the room

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the spiral staircase, moving past the cream sofa

entered.detail: tall gothic arched windows with diamond-patterned glass and greenery visible outside

segments.scene_description: Turning left toward the spiral staircase, moving past the cream sofa. The grand piano is visible near the tall gothic windows as the camera approaches the wrought-iron staircase structure.

events.description: beginning to ascend the spiral staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase, circling around the central iron column

entered.detail: ornate black wrought-iron railing with decorative curves
wooden balcony with iron railing visible at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: Ascending the spiral staircase, circling around the central column. The lower floor with its rugs and furniture falls away below as the camera climbs toward the upper wooden balcony.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the entrance of a grand gothic common room as it ascends toward an upper balcony. It begins by passing through a stone archway, where a Gobstones poster on the wall gives way to the sight of an ornate blue domed ceiling and a central gazebo. As the camera crosses a large circular blue rug, the view expands to reveal a cream sofa by the windows and a spiral staircase in the distance. The scene then shifts left, gliding past the sofa and a grand piano positioned near tall gothic windows before approaching the wrought-iron staircase. Finally, the camera climbs the spiral stairs, circling the central column as the furniture and rugs of the lower floor recede below.
